name: codex-usage-notifier
description: Create Windows desktop and optional email reminders for Codex usage refresh times.

interface.shortDescription: Remind me when Codex usage refreshes.
interface.longDescription: Codex Usage Notifier bundles a small local Python utility and skill instructions for setting reminders from the reset time shown by Codex's usage page or limit banner.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set a Codex usage refresh reminder using the reset time Codex shows.
